series_metadata.series_description: Established to track complaints and services provided by county and public children’s service agencies. Services include adoption, file net placement and cases of child abuse and neglect. Manual log contains case information, name, requester, policy clarification and response or action taken. Also legislative inquiries are tracked, documenting the number of calls or letters received and responses.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office 60 days, image ; Electronic: in office
